title: The Villager Grinder Mod
description: Send thy Villagers to the grinder!
body:
![VillagerGrinderBanner](https://imgur.com/WQUXzNa.png)

Do your villagers insult you with hideous trades?

Do they look at you smugly while demanding absurd prices??

Do you **HATE** villagers???

**THEN THIS MOD IS FOR YOU!**

Simply insert a villager into a Villager Grinder and watch as they are no longer your problem!

<details>
<summary>Function</summary>

Only villagers can be put through the villager grinder. If any other mob is put into the grinder they will be rejected.

If there is nothing in the grinder it will take a villager from the block above the grinder to make it easier to put them in, however, they won't do this if a villager is already inside it.

There is no limit to how many villagers can be put inside a grinder, and it will drop more stuff depending on how many villagers are inside.

</details>

This mod was made with MCreator.

This is a link to Mcreator - [**MCreator**](https://mcreator.net/)

 

I will not make a Fabric version of this mod. 

 

This mod will stay in 1.16.5 for the foreseeable future.

 

**Tell me if any issues are found.**
